clusters.title: Christopher Golda and Grey Baker Join YC as General Partners
clusters.summary: We're excited to announce that Christopher Golda and Grey Baker are joining YC as General Partners.

clusters.title: Diana Hu Is YC's Newest Managing Partner
clusters.summary: We're thrilled to announce that Diana Hu has been promoted to Managing Partner at Y Combinator. Few people have built a startup from zero and also shipped tech to 100 million people. Diana has done both.

clusters.title: Adding Canada Back to Our List of Accepted Countries of Incorporation
clusters.summary: After hearing feedback from Canadian founders in our network, we are adding Canada back to our list of accepted countries of incorporation.

clusters.title: Congratulations to EquipmentShare on Going Public
clusters.summary: Today, EquipmentShare (YC W15) goes public. From Missouri to 373 locations nationwide, they've built the operating system construction has been missing—built by contractors, for contractors. Congrats to Jabbok, Willy, and the EquipmentShare team on a huge milestone.

clusters.title: 2026 Demo Day Dates
clusters.summary: We’re excited to share the Demo Day dates for 2026 so founders, investors, and our broader community can plan ahead.

clusters.title: Meesho Goes Public
clusters.summary: Meesho goes public today. From S16 to IPO, they’ve built one of India’s largest e-commerce platforms—empowering millions of small merchants to grow their businesses. Congrats to Vidit and Sanjeev on a decade of relentless building and listening to users!

clusters.title: Congratulations to Groww
clusters.summary: Today, Groww, India's leading digital investing platform, goes public. Tens of millions use Groww to invest simply and confidently in stocks, mutual funds, and ETFs. As YC's first company to list in India, we couldn't be more proud.

clusters.title: BillionToOne Goes Public — The Startup That Made Genetic Testing Universal
clusters.summary: Today, BillionToOne goes public, becoming YC's fourth publicly traded biotech company. More importantly, they have built one of the most important genetic tests in the U.S. Today, 1 in 11 babies born in the US are tested with BillionToOne's fetal genetic test.

clusters.title: Meet YC's Newest Visiting Partners
clusters.summary: We're excited to announce that nine exceptional founders are joining us as Visiting Partners at YC: Matt Riley, Harshita Arora, Grey Baker, Christopher Golda, Raphael Schaad, Christina Gilbert, Francois Chaubard, Vivian Shen, and James Evans.

clusters.title: Ankit Gupta Joins YC as General Partner, Bringing Deep ML Expertise
clusters.summary: We’re thrilled to announce that Ankit Gupta is joining YC as our newest General Partner. Ankit has already worked with dozens of YC founders as a visiting partner in recent batches. He has a rare blend of deep machine learning expertise and firsthand startup experience that make him

clusters.title: Dalton Caldwell’s Move to Partner Emeritus
clusters.summary: After 12+ years, 25 batches, and working with more than a thousand startups, Dalton Caldwell is transitioning to Partner Emeritus at YC.
